completed_work: Added file_sha256 helper and content_hash match/mismatch audit findings.
Added refresh_capability_hashes.py to update CAP evidence file hashes.
Refreshed CAP-0001 evidence hashes for twelve mechanism/interface/test files.
key_decisions: Treat missing file as error, missing content_hash as warning, content_hash mismatch as warning, and content_hash match as info.
Bind CAP evidence to file content using SHA-256 while preserving v1 semantics that mismatches indicate stale verification rather than proof of false capability.
next_actions: Add build_self_model.py to generate SELF_MODEL.json as aggregation-only from CAP/GAP/VERIFY records and current audit findings.
risks: Content-hash mismatch still does not prove semantic capability failure; it only signals that the evidence file changed since the recorded hash.
summary_text: SELF-MODEL content-hash binding is implemented. The self-model audit now computes SHA-256 hashes for capability evidence files and reports hash match, missing-hash, and mismatch states. CAP-0001 was refreshed so all twelve declared mechanism/interface/test evidence files now carry content_hash values, and the audit reports SELF_MODEL_CONTENT_HASH_MATCH for each. A new scripts/refresh_capability_hashes.py helper refreshes null or existing hashes for CAP records. Tests were expanded to cover matching hashes, missing hashes, mismatches, and script-based refresh. Focused self-model tests passed with 10 tests and the full suite passed with 279 tests before commit 241661b.
